name: ctx-index
description: | Index a local file or directory into context-mode's persistent FTS5 knowledge base so future ctx_search calls can retrieve focused snippets without rereading raw files. Trigger: /context-mode:ctx-index
author: mksglu
summary_zh: 把本地文件或目录建好全文索引存进知识库，之后查找时只取相关片段，省得每次重读原始文件。
